summary.lv: Latvijas Pasts AS meklē Vecāko IS konsultantu darbam ar Microsoft Dynamics 365 Finance & Operations, ietverot biznesa procesu analīzi, datu migrāciju un integrāciju ar D365FO.
summary.en: Latvijas Pasts AS is seeking a Senior IS Consultant to work with Microsoft Dynamics 365 Finance & Operations, covering business process analysis, data migrations, and integrations with D365FO and Power Platform.
